consentBanner.text: We use cookies to analyze app usage and improve your experience.

quizSettingsBar.dailyNote: Questions automatically selected from your memorization scope

s1.title: Test Your Memorization
s1.body: An app that tests your Quran memorization with multiple-choice questions and lets you compete with memorizers worldwide.
s1.p1: Questions tailored to your memorization scope

s2.title: How It Works
s2.body: A verse snippet appears, and you choose the correct next word from five options. Each correct answer increases your score, and if you make a mistake, we reveal the full verse and its position in the Quran.

s3.title: Daily Challenge
s3.body: 10 new questions every day within your memorized scope, with a timer. Answer quickly and accurately to score maximum points before time runs out.

s4.title: Top the Leaderboard
s4.body: Compare your score with memorizers worldwide on the leaderboard — daily and all-time rankings. Collect points and climb the ranks.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.body: At Quran Quiz Net, we value your privacy. This page explains what data we collect, how we use it, and how we protect it when you use the app.

dataCollected.title: Data We Collect
dataCollected.body: When you sign in with Google or Facebook, we store your name, profile photo, and email address to create your profile. We also save your memorization progress, test results, and settings. You can also use the app as a guest without signing in.

useOfData.title: How We Use Your Data
useOfData.body: We use your data to save and sync your progress across your devices, display your ranking in the leaderboard and daily challenge, and improve your in-app experience. We do not sell your data or display ads.

cookiesAnalytics.title: Cookies & Analytics
cookiesAnalytics.body: We use Google Analytics to understand how the app is used (such as visited pages and test count) to improve the user experience, using cookies. We only enable this tracking with your consent, and you can decline it from the consent banner without affecting your app usage. We use this data for analytics only and not for advertising.

storageSecurity.title: Storage & Security
storageSecurity.body: Your data is stored on Google's Firebase servers with appropriate protection. Your local data remains on your device and is cleared when you sign out.

accountDeletion.title: Account Deletion
accountDeletion.body: You can sign out at any time to clear your local data from this device. To permanently delete your account and all your data from our servers yourself: from the main screen, tap the settings icon ⚙ at the top of the page, then tap "Delete Account" at the bottom of the Settings page, and confirm deletion. Your account is deleted immediately, and this action cannot be undone.

termsOfUse.title: Terms of Use
termsOfUse.body: The app is designed to help you review your memorization of the Holy Quran. The service is provided "as is" without warranties, and we strive for accuracy in the Quranic content based on the Tanzil source (tanzil.net).

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any inquiries regarding privacy or terms, you can contact us via the app's official email.

technical.title: Technical Support
technical.body: Encountered an issue with the app, or have a suggestion to improve it? We're happy to help. Email us below and we will respond as soon as possible.

sync.title: Sign-in or Sync Issues
sync.body: If you experience an issue signing in with Google or Facebook, or notice that your progress is not syncing across your devices, contact us mentioning your device type and operating system so we can assist you faster.

deletion.title: Account or Data Deletion
deletion.body: To request the permanent deletion of your account and data stored on our servers, email us below and we will complete the request within a few days.

dailyRank.behindBy: Your rank today: #{{rank}} of {{total}} — behind by {{diff}} points from {{name}}

beginner.comment: The question starts from the top of the verse, and increases your score by 5

elementary.comment: The question starts from three words, and increases your score by 10

secondary.comment: The question starts from two words, and increases your score by 20

advanced.comment: More than one correct answer, and increases your score by 30
